introduce.title: What CarModSnap is
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: An AI-powered visualizer for car appearance modifications: wraps, wheels, body kits, and before/after comparisons.

usage.title: How to use CarModSnap
usage.description: Three steps from idea to a build you can actually book:

items.title: Pick your car
items.description: Select your make and model, or upload a photo of your own car.

items.title: Visualize the build
items.description: Try wraps, wheels, and body kits and watch the AI render your build.

items.title: Get a real quote
items.description: Send the concept to a local wrap shop in supported markets to request a quote.

items.title: Share your concept
items.description: Save the build to your account and share it with friends or the community.

features.title: Key features
features.description: Everything you need to plan a real-world build.

items.title: Wrap & paint visualizer
items.description: Realistic AI rendering of paint and wrap finishes on your exact vehicle.

items.title: Wheel fitment preview
items.description: Browse wheel styles and see them mounted on your car before you buy.

items.title: Body kit visualizer
items.description: Aero kits, lips, side skirts, and diffusers, rendered in context.

items.title: Before / after comparisons
items.description: Side-by-side renders of stock vs. modified, ready to share.

items.title: Mobile-friendly
items.description: Use CarModSnap from any device, anywhere.

items.title: Privacy-respecting
items.description: We do not use your uploaded photos to train AI models. See our Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: What is CarModSnap?
items.answer: CarModSnap is an AI-powered car modification visualizer for testing wrap colors, wheel styles, and body kits before you spend money at the shop.

items.question: Do I need any 3D or design skills?
items.answer: No. CarModSnap is built for everyday drivers and car enthusiasts — pick a car, pick a direction, let the AI do the rendering.

items.question: What kinds of modifications can I preview?
items.answer: Wraps and paint colors, wheel sizes and styles, body kits and aero parts, plus before/after comparisons of stock vs. modified.

items.question: How accurate are the renderings?
items.answer: CarModSnap is meant for planning and concept validation. Final color, finish, and fitment decisions should still be confirmed with physical samples and the installer.

items.question: Is CarModSnap free to use?
items.answer: There are free entry points to explore the product. Paid plans unlock more credits, advanced AI generation, higher-resolution exports, and commercial usage. Payments are processed by our provider Creem.

cta.title: Ready to visualize your next build?
cta.description: Try CarModSnap with a free entry point, or jump straight into a plan.
